display.purpose: Page titles and the strongest visible headings.

headline.purpose: Section titles such as catalog and admin blocks.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions, labels, and table content.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for submits and important task completion.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-brand, #ff6347); color: #fff; padding: 12px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font: 700 14px/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-brand-hover, #ff4500); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-brand-hover, #ff4500); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Alternative action button for canceling edits or switching state.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: var(--color-text, #333333); color: #fff; padding: 12px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font: 700 14px/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--color-ink, #111111); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-brand-hover, #ff4500); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Plain form control used for text, email, password, and numeric fields.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 5px; font: 700 14px/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; color: var(--color-text, #333333); } .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #dddddd); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-surface, #ffffff); color: var(--color-text, #333333); font: 400 14px/1.45 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border: 2px solid var(--color-brand-hover, #ff4500); }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Generic white container for filters, summaries, and grouped content.
components.html:
Categorías

Lista de filtros y acciones relacionadas.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface, #ffffff); color: var(--color-text, #333333); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #dddddd); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; font: 400 14px/1.45 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 700 18px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-card-copy { margin: 0; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Plain inline navigation links used in the header.
components.html: InicioCarrito
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; font: 700 14px/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { color: var(--color-text, #333333); text-decoration: none; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-bg, #f0f0f0); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--color-brand-hover, #ff4500); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-brand-hover, #ff4500); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Modal Panel
components.description: Centered overlay panel for product details and other one-off interruptive views.
components.html:
Detalle del producto

Contenido del modal.
components.css: .ds-modal-shell { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: grid; place-items: center; padding: 20px; background: rgb(0 0 0 / 55%); } .ds-modal { width: min(100%, 520px); max-height: 90vh; overflow: auto; background: var(--color-surface, #ffffff); color: var(--color-text, #333333); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #dddddd); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; font: 400 14px/1.45 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-modal-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 700 18px/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-modal-copy { margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
This system is a practical storefront, not a performance. It should feel like a clean, familiar counter in a small food shop: clear labels, fast decisions, and no decorative detours. The existing UI already points in that direction with a soft gray canvas, white surfaces, tomato-orange accents, and a single sans family used everywhere.

The interface favors quick comprehension over atmosphere. Pages are dense where they need to be, but the hierarchy stays calm: headers lead, panels contain, and actions are obvious. The responsive behavior is structural rather than theatrical, collapsing from a two-column layout to a single column at smaller widths so the workflow stays intact on mobile.

This system explicitly rejects anything extravagant, ornamental, or hard to use. It should never feel cluttered, flashy, or clever for its own sake. Familiar patterns win because the product is a university prototype and the job is to show the flow clearly.
keyCharacteristics: Orange as a functional accent, not decoration.
White surfaces, soft borders, and restrained elevation.

rules.name: The Accent Is Work Rule
rules.body: Tomato orange is reserved for primary actions, active states, and important totals. If everything is orange, nothing is.

rules.name: The Neutral First Rule
rules.body: Most of the screen should be gray, white, or ink. The surface carries the interface; the accent carries the intent.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: One sans family is enough for this app. Keep headings, controls, and data in the same voice.

rules.name: The Small-UI Rule
rules.body: Keep type fixed and compact. No fluid scaling, no display theatrics, and no oversized headers that break the dashboard rhythm.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Do not stack shadows on cards and controls. Flat surfaces with borders are the default; shadow is reserved for the few places that need true lift.

rules.name: The One Lift Rule
rules.body: When depth appears, it should signal a single state change, not decorate every container.

dos: Do keep the primary path obvious on every screen: login, browse, cart, admin.
Do use the existing gray-and-white surfaces as the base of the interface.
Do reserve tomato orange for primary actions, active states, and totals.
Do keep forms, cards, and tables compact and easy to scan.
Do preserve the familiar browser-native feel of the current prototype.
Do collapse the layout structurally on small screens so the flow stays usable.
Do use simple feedback blocks for success, error, and info states.
donts: Don't make the interface extravagant, ornamental, or hard to use.
Don't add flashy motion, decorative effects, or clever interactions that slow the task down.
Don't introduce a new font family or a second visual voice.
Don't replace the current neutral background-and-surface system with a tinted or saturated full-page treatment.
Don't turn the accent color into decoration; it is functional.
Don't make cards, buttons, or inputs feel overdesigned or unusually rounded.
Don't obscure standard form and navigation behavior behind custom UI.
